implementation_summary: Added PendingRemoval interface (inline before MarmotProvider). Added pendingRemovalsRef (useRef<Map<string, PendingRemoval[]>>(new Map())) and debounceTimersRef (useRef<Map<string, NodeJS.Timeout>>(new Map())) at component top level alongside groupSubsRef. Defined enqueueLeave as useCallback with empty deps array — appends PendingRemoval with receivedAt: Date.now(), clears any prior timer with clearTimeout, sets new 5000ms setTimeout (no-op body with comment marking S5 fill-in), writes timer to debounceTimersRef. Wired enqueueLeave into buildDispatcher deps call as deps.enqueueLeave (replacing MOCK-S2-001 stub). Added timer cleanup in groupSubsRef teardown loop: clearTimeout + debounceTimersRef.current.delete(groupId) per group. Queue (pendingRemovalsRef) is NOT cleared on teardown — retained for historical-sync repopulation on re-subscribe. Updated mocks-registry.json: MOCK-S2-001.resolved = true, all_resolved = true. Updated registerHandlers.ts comment on the ?? fallback to document it as resolved.

mock_resolutions.description: Stub enqueueLeave from S2 replaced by real closure in MarmotContext.tsx. The ?? (() => {}) fallback in registerHandlers.ts is retained as a defensive default for unit tests that construct the dispatcher without MarmotContext.
